ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the speech */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the speaker */,
  "intended_speaker_target" INTEGER /* ID of the intended target of the speech */,
  "matched_to_topic" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the speech is matched to a topic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the speech */,
  "intended_topic_target" INTEGER /* ID of the intended target of the topic */,
  "matched_words" TEXT /* List of matched keywords from the speech */,
  "speech_date" TEXT /* Date of the speech */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the speech was given */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the speech */,
  "tone" TEXT /* Tone of the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_intended_speaker_target FOREIGN KEY ("intended_speaker_target") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_intended_topic_target FOREIGN KEY ("intended_topic_target") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword extracted from speeches */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "relevance_score" TEXT /* Relevance score of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_keyword_mapping" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword in the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech being analyzed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_analysis_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_analysis_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the speech */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of the sentiment (Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_sentiment_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_topics" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" TEXT /* Relevance score of the topic to the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "topic_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the political party of the speaker
ID of the intended target of the speech
Indicates whether the speech is matched to a topic
Reference to the topic of the speech
ID of the intended target of the topic
List of matched keywords from the speech
